meaning: n.可以信任的人,使船待命的信息 备用
examples: Five ambulances are on standby at the port.
Canned varieties of beans and peas are a good standby.
The emergency services were put on standby after a bomb warning.
And, even if the batteries die, you can still use the old standby: an actual key.
The next great set-top standby debate is brewing and will culminate in February 2009.
